question:
Why is gossiping generally viewed as a negative social behavior?
A) It is an ineffective way to communicate basic, objective facts.
B) It usually results in the gossiper losing their voice.
C) It can spread misinformation and damage reputations without giving the subject a chance to defend themselves.
D) It prevents people from forming any social bonds.
